name: Skip Link
description: Accessible navigation link that lets keyboard and screen reader users bypass repeated header/navigation content and move focus to main content.

targetId.description: ID of the target element to focus when the skip link is activated. If no matching element exists, SkipLink does not render.

children.description: Visible skip link label, for example 'Skip to main content'.

onClick.description: Optional click handler; component still moves focus to target before invoking callback.

onKeyUp.description: Optional keyup handler; Enter and Space trigger focus movement to target.

onBlur.description: Optional blur handler; internal behavior restores temporary tabindex handling on target.

slots.default: Anchor text content for the skip action.

keyboard: Tab: when entering page focus order, focus lands on skip link; subsequent Tab moves to next focusable element
Shift+Tab: from skip link, focus moves to previous focusable element; from main content, shifts back toward header controls
Enter/Space: activates skip link and moves focus to target element
aria: Provide clear link text describing target destination (for example 'Skip to main content')
Target element should be a meaningful landmark or heading container for primary content
